body: The page refusing to scroll up/down when I try to select stuff on mobile pisses me off, but an update thankfully fixed moving with the spacebar. Unfortunately, it relying on AI sounds like a security/privacy risk and an environmental one. That said, the toggle lists are amazing and its main competition is Google Docs and Microsoft Word... two programs by companies I consider morally bankrupt as of late. You have room to do MUCH better, but your competition is far worse.
Great app. One big problem. A few months ago it started gargling input when using voice dictation. For me this is a serious degradation in usability. Upgrades haven't helped.
